name: Elijah Wilkins
researcher_question: Using Kentucky death certificates, what were the date and place of death of Elijah Wilkins of Kentucky, and what information in the certificate confirms his identity?
notes: Death record indexed under name variants (Eligie/Elizah/Eligah); several other Wilkins relatives in the same tree share similar names/places, so identity confirmation (spouse Sally/K2BS-YMD, parents James/Margaret) matters for disambiguation.
